## Describe the changes
A clear and concise description of what the PR accomplishes and why it's necessary.

## Sovereign Architecture Verification
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have run `pwsh -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "sovereign.ps1"` and verified the controller starts and acquires the mutex lock.
- [ ] I am pushing this code using the `no-mistakes` PR gating module.
- [ ] My code adheres to `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest`.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Semantic Skill Addition (Adding a new SKILL.md)
